things.name: Newborn Monument
things.description: Iconic giant letter sculpture celebrating Kosovo's 2008 declaration of independence

things.name: National Library of Kosovo
things.description: Unique Modernist building designed by Croatian architect Andrija Mutnjakovic

things.name: Imperial Mosque (Xhamia e Mbretit)
things.description: 15th-century Ottoman mosque, one of the oldest buildings in Pristina

things.name: Kosovo National Theatre
things.description: Cultural hub showcasing Kosovo's arts and drama scene

things.name: Cathedral of Blessed Teresa
things.description: Modern Roman Catholic cathedral dedicated to Pristina-born Mother Teresa

things.name: Ethnological Museum of Kosovo
things.description: 18th-century Ottoman house museum of traditional Kosovo culture and crafts

things.name: Skanderbeg Square
things.description: City's central square with the monument to Albanian hero Gjergj Skanderbeg

things.name: Gracanica Monastery
things.description: Serbian Orthodox monastery built in 1321 with UNESCO World Heritage frescos

things.name: Bear Sanctuary Pristina
things.description: Rescued bears rehabilitated in a natural forest enclosure outside the city

things.name: Germia Park
things.description: City park with swimming pool, cafes and forest walks above the city
